scripts.fastapi-dev: cd backend && uv sync --extra dev && uv run fastapi dev ../api/index.py && cd ..
scripts.next-dev: cd web && npm run dev && cd ..
scripts.build: cd web && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.start: cd web && npm run start && cd ..
scripts.clean: cd web && npm run clean && cd ..
scripts.lint: cd web && npm run lint && cd ..
scripts.test: cd web && npm run test && cd ..
scripts.test:e2e: cd web && npm run test:e2e && cd ..
scripts.test:e2e:ui: cd web && npm run test:e2e:ui && cd ..
scripts.test:e2e:debug: cd web && npm run test:e2e:debug && cd ..
scripts.test:e2e:report: cd web && npm run test:e2e:report && cd ..
scripts.rebuild: cd web && npm run rebuild && cd ..
scripts.docker-back: docker compose up -d db db_test backend --build
